cases.prompt: Build a phased PoC to prove whether this shim-daemon topology can survive restarts before we refactor production code.
cases.notes: Architecture claim needs experimental proof, phase ladder, and refactor evidence.

cases.prompt: Continue the proofing ladder until the global goal is reached, generate criteria for every phase, and produce an ADR at the end.
cases.notes: Explicit proofing, phase criteria, global goal, and ADR request.

cases.prompt: A unit test fails after this change; find the bug and fix it.
cases.near_miss_reason: First-pass concrete failure triage belongs to debug; no architecture proof substrate is requested.

cases.prompt: We already tried two fixes and the failure keeps coming back; trace the real root cause.
cases.near_miss_reason: Repeated failure and root-cause tracing belongs to investigate until the next action is an experimental architecture proof.
cases.notes: Root-cause investigation may later hand off to proofing.

cases.prompt: Check whether the project is production ready and list the release blockers.
cases.near_miss_reason: Release readiness audit belongs to production-ready-check; proofing is for disputed architecture/runtime claims.
